title: Anacamptis pseudolaxiflora

This classification is further divided into the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Orchideae. Anacamptis pseudolaxiflora is also classified as a member of the genus Anacamptis. The species is native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe.

The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and inflammation, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
